positive: A whimsical, minimalist scene featuring a highly stylized forest landscape rendered in thick, clean black linework on a light cream background. The main subject is a cluster of geometric, stylized woodland animals (e.g., foxes, deer, badgers) surrounded by exaggerated flora like stylized toadstools and twisting vines. The composition should be centrally balanced and suitable for apparel printing, emphasizing strong silhouettes and high contrast. Style: Graphic novel illustration mixed with modern tattoo art aesthetics. Use deep charcoal black ink. Lighting should be flat and graphic, avoiding gradients or complex shadows. Artwork must be vector-clean, suitable for screen printing.
negative: blurry, artifacts, watermark, text, signature, logo, gradient, noise, low resolution, poor composition, abstract, photorealism, color palette (unless specified)
